text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm setting up for the day's early-morning
training, I'm greeted by a familiar voice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. I thought I might find you
here.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I slept well last night, so I thought I might come
and pay you a visit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, more precisely, I thought I might lie in wait
and surprise you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But it seems even the Emperor cannot outdo you
when it comes to early starts.
